Actions.Text: REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Provides for the incorporation of the New Hartford Volunteer Exempt Firefighters' Benevolent Association
Summary: Provides for the incorporation of the New Hartford Volunteer Exempt Firefighters' Benevolent Association.
ActClause: AN ACT to incorporate the New Hartford Volunteer Exempt Firefighters' Benevolent Association and providing for its powers and duties
